papers_mined.title: Tapa cloth (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Pacific bark cloth; mulberry inner bark beaten thin; multiple strips beaten into large sheet; tapioca-paste adhesive joins seams; fetaʻaki = double-layer cloth with strips AT RIGHT ANGLES then painted = ngatu.

papers_mined.title: How to Make Tongan Tapa Cloth Ngatu
papers_mined.note: Bark soaked, beaten, laminated with tapioca paste; orthogonal strip layers.

papers_mined.title: Tapa Cloths from Pacific Islands (Peabody)
papers_mined.note: Multiple thin strips laminated with starch.

papers_mined.title: Fibers of History: Tongan Tapa Cloths
papers_mined.note: 3-4 laminated layers with orthogonal grain orientation; tapioca paste adhesive.

papers_mined.title: PINN Enhancing FE Simulations of 3D-Printed PLA (Springer 2026)
papers_mined.note: Physics-Informed NN trained on raster angle + infill density + layer thickness for material property prediction.

papers_mined.title: NN solution for LOM Process Performance
papers_mined.note: NN for laminated object manufacturing predicting layer thickness, surface roughness, tensile strength.

papers_mined.title: Design optimization of laminated composite via ANN + GA
papers_mined.note: ANN for laminated composite weight optimization using lamination parameters.

papers_mined.title: Deep Language Networks: Stacking LLMs in Trainable Layers
